generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent rise in lone-wolf attacks shows why we need expanded powers for our security agencies. Yes, some liberties might be temporarily affected, but isn't that a small price for keeping our families safe? Look at what happened in [Redacted City] - if agencies had more tools, that tragedy might have been prevented. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
